query:
SELECT u.name, u.username, psd.businessDate, psd.stationCode, p.poNumber, p.batchNo, p.productName,
       psd.completedQty, psd.baseUnitPoints, psd.reworkFactor, psd.qualityFactor, psd.earnedPoints,
       pc.categoryName, psd.subtypeCode
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
JOIN products p ON p.id = psd.productId
LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = psd.categoryId
WHERE psd.userId IN (
  SELECT id FROM users WHERE username IN ('geng03','ying43') OR name IN ('桔梗達曼','佳穎')
)
AND psd.businessDate = '2026-05-08'
ORDER BY u.name, psd.createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT u.name, u.username, psd.businessDate, psd.stationCode, p.poNumber, p.batchNo, p.productName,
       psd.completedQty, psd.baseUnitPoints, psd.reworkFactor, psd.qualityFactor, psd.earnedPoints,
       pc.categoryName, psd.subtypeCode
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
JOIN products p ON p.id = psd.productId
LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = psd.categoryId
WHERE psd.userId IN (
  SELECT id FROM users WHERE username IN ('geng03','ying43') OR name IN ('桔梗達曼','佳穎')
)
AND psd.businessDate = '2026-05-08'
ORDER BY u.name, psd.createdAt DESC;
